_comment: Copy the value of _swagger_body and paste it into Swagger POST /api/v1/chat-evaluation/runs. No expected_scenario_ids needed — the system auto-labels each query using an LLM judge.

test_cases.query: My Afriex transfer has been pending for over 48 hours and I need it resolved urgently.
What is the USD to NGN exchange rate right now and how is it calculated?
How do I complete KYC verification on Afriex? What documents are accepted?
I sent money to the wrong person. Can Afriex reverse the transaction?
What are the transfer fees for sending $500 from the US to Nigeria?
My recipient in Lagos says they have not received the money. The transfer shows completed on my end.
How long does it take for a transfer to be credited to a Nigerian bank account?
I cannot log into my Afriex account. I think it has been locked or suspended.
How do I increase my Afriex transfer limit?
How do I send money to Nigeria for the first time?
Which African countries does Afriex support for transfers?
I want to cancel my pending transfer and get a refund.
